title: AI Music Generator
markdown:
#  AI Music Generator 
##  Create unique music effortlessly with DeepAI's music generator. Perfect for foley, sound effects, and background tracks for your videos. Transform your projects with custom-generated soundscapes tailored to your needs. 
Use Olde Model
If you have DeepAI Pro, your first 100 songs are free each month, with additional songs costing $0.05 each. More information can be found in our . Generated audio may be shared publicly. 
## Community Music
